// note: Declaration-emit config for the published types. We emit .d.ts with tsc rather than dts-bundle-generator: that tool's resolver chokes on @anthropic-ai/sdk's .d.ts.mjs typings, which embed a literal import('undici-types/index.d.ts.mjs').RequestInit path it cannot map to a symbol (the provider's public surface transitively reaches it). tsc resolves RequestInit correctly from @types/node. rootDir ./src keeps the entry's declaration at dist/index.d.ts, aligned with dist/index.js from bun build.
